g.text: Roadmap: Bottom-Up Programming Model Induction with LLMs
How to evolve a programming-model basis when the low-level target is known

text.tspan: extracts and reuses new abstractions in wake-
natural language guides library learning and
e-graphs and equality saturation for modularity
adds frequent structures to the DSL, improves
LLM learns surrogate CFG model for
DSL designed for reliable LLM generation
ISA / AscendC / LLVM / MLIR / API / runtime blocks
Induce and evolve a programming model M:
verifiers, examples, docs, and cost model.
M is accepted only when it improves synthesis,
or productivity over direct target programming.
connects LLM semantics with low-level robot
LLM generates code policies over API primitives
LLM maps instructions to reward functions
self-evolving libraries over agent and coder
modular code generation and structured lowering
relational compilation from raw code to DSL
domain dialect and bridge to bare-metal C
evolutionary AscendC optimization and motif bank
discovers new algorithms at assembly/IR level
search and compose new agents and composition
optimize graphs of agents and prompts
agents design agents; growing skill library
